title: ModMult   x  ->  (a*x) mod N    (bits=3, N=3, a=2)    --    construction = shift-and-add of controlled modular ADDERS (each MODADD box is a Cuccaro modular adder; see Arithmetic/Cuccaro)
input: x = q0..q2 = input integer (multiplicand);   w = q3..q14 = workspace |0> (accumulator + a copy of x).   full budget dim = 23, q15..q22 unused
output: x = q0..q2 = (a*x) mod N;   w = |0> (workspace restored).    WHY: the 3 MODADDs build a*x = sum_j x_j*(a*2^j) in the accumulator; SWAP moves it into x; uncompute clears the old x.

blocks.label: ctrl-MODADD  acc += a*2^0 mod N = 2   (control x0 = q12)
ctrl-MODADD  acc += a*2^1 mod N = 1   (control x1 = q13)
ctrl-MODADD  acc += a*2^2 mod N = 2   (control x2 = q14)
